description_long: This picnic table features a square tabletop constructed from several parallel wooden planks, framed by a metallic border that adds both durability and a modern aesthetic. The wood planks display a natural grain pattern and are evenly spaced, providing a sturdy and visually appealing surface. The tabletop is supported by a single, central pedestal leg made of metal, which branches out into a four-footed base for stability. The design is minimalist, with no attached benches, making it suitable for flexible seating arrangements. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for outdoor use, likely resistant to weather and wear. The overall appearance is robust and functional, with a blend of natural and industrial elements.
description: A square picnic table with a wooden plank tabletop framed in metal, supported by a central metal pedestal base. The design is modern and sturdy, suitable for outdoor environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tabletop with visible wood grain and the central metal pedestal base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the alignment of the wooden planks and the sturdy metal base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the even spacing of the wood planks and the symmetrical metal support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the continuous wood surface and the four-footed metal base.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a single central metal pedestal that branches into a four-footed base, providing stability and even weight distribution.
